headline: O'Reilly Automotive Debt Issue Reshapes Balance Sheet And Valuation Debate
summary: O'Reilly Automotive (NasdaqGS:ORLY) issued $850 million in senior notes due 2036. The company plans to use the proceeds to refinance existing debt and support future corporate initiatives. The new long term fixed rate notes adjust O'Reilly's capital structure and liquidity profile. O'Reilly Automotive, trading at $94.6 per share, has delivered a 73.1% return over the past 3 years and 194.0% over the past 5 years. The stock is also up 7.6% over the past year, which helps frame this new debt...

headline: Is O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) Pricing Leave Enough Upside After Strong Multi‑Year Run
summary: If you are wondering whether O'Reilly Automotive's current share price lines up with its underlying worth, this breakdown aims to give you a clear, valuation focused view. The stock last closed at US$94.60, with returns of 0.8% over the past week, 0.4% over the past month, 4.7% year to date, 7.6% over 1 year, 73.1% over 3 years and 194.0% over 5 years. Recent attention on O'Reilly Automotive has focused on its role as a major US auto parts retailer and how that position fits into long term...
